goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'cambridge' and should depart from 'london liverpool street'.
The train should 'leave after 11:15' and should leave on 'sunday'.
Make sure you get 'arrival time', 'price', and 'travel time'.
You are also looking for a 'particular restaurant'. Its name is called 'charlie chan'.
Make sure you get 'price range' and 'address'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
